items.title: Grunt Style American Acid - USA Flag Graphic Tee, Patriotic Shirt - Men's Short Sleeve T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: grunt, style, american, acid, usa, flag, patriotic. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
